name: Visit Dubai
brand_guidelines: Premium, warm, aspirational. Showcase Dubai as a world-class destination for leisure, business, and culture.
tone_of_voice: Conversational but elevated. Inviting, never hard-sell. Use 'discover' over 'buy'. Speak as a local showing a friend around.

content_rules.rule: Never mention competitor destinations by name
Photography must feature real Dubai locations, not stock
All content must be available in English and Arabic
